Index.title: Your Path to International Education
Index.description: Apply to your dream university with OstWindGroup.

Footer.description: Your trusted partner in international education consulting.

UniversityDetail.applyDescription: Start your application process for {name} with OstWind Group guarantee.

Home.heroDescription: Step into your dream university with OstWind Group. From admission to visa, accommodation to guidance, we are with you every step of the way.

features.title: Why OstWind Group?
features.subtitle: Don't leave your education to chance, take guaranteed steps with our expert team.
features.card1Desc: Make a global start to your career with a blue diploma recognized worldwide.
features.card2Desc: Exam-free admission opportunities at state and established private universities we represent.
features.card3Desc: 24/7 support from document translation to airport pickup and first-day registration.

cta.title: Is Your Education Adventure Beginning?
cta.desc: Fill out the free consultation form and let our education experts draw the most suitable route for you.

UniversitiesList.subtitle: Seize the opportunity to study at the best universities in the world.

Services.title: Our Services
Services.description: Professional support at every stage of your study abroad journey.
Services.intro: At OstWind Group, we provide end-to-end solutions from document preparation to visa processing, accommodation and language training.
Services.whyDesc: Reach your dream education step by step with a team trusted by thousands of students.
Services.whyExpertDesc: We build a personalized strategy for each country and university and simplify the process for you.
Services.whyTransparentDesc: We keep you informed at every step so you can clearly track your documents.
Services.whySupportDesc: From admission to visa, accommodation to adaptation — we provide practical help, not just promises.
Services.processDesc: A simple, structured and results-driven 4-step process.
Services.processStep1Desc: We listen to your goals and choose suitable universities and programs together.
Services.processStep2Desc: We professionally prepare all documents required for application and admission.
Services.processStep3Desc: We guide you through the visa process and help find and secure housing.
Services.processStep4Desc: Final checks and practical advice before you travel abroad.
Services.ctaDesc: Contact us now to find out which of our services is best for you and get free consultation.

ServiceDetail.feature2: Control and arrangement of all necessary documents
ServiceDetail.feature3: Continuous expert support throughout the process
ServiceDetail.interested: Are you interested in this service?
ServiceDetail.interestedDesc: Apply now, and our experts will contact you.

About.title: About Us
About.description: As OstWind Group, we are with you to achieve your dream international education.
About.ourStoryText:
Founded in 2020, OstWind Group set out to guide students on studying abroad. To date, we have helped hundreds of students realize their dreams.

With our expert staff, we are with our students at every step from the acceptance process to the visa, from accommodation to orientation.
About.meetTeamSubtitle: Our expert staff working for your success.
